order_number.orig_str: शासन निर्णय क्रमांक आव्यप्र-२०२५/प्र.क्र. ४५/आपत्ती-१ ( E Office 1361728 )

para_trans: Posts created for Disaster Management Division, Ministry
Government Decision No.2025 / No.45 / Disaster-1 (E Office 1361728) Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,

Read: - 1. Revenue B. Forest Department, Government Decision No. AYUPA-2025 / Q. No. 45 / AYUPA-1, D. 30.09.2025 2. Department of Finance, Government Decision No. Designation-2016 / Q. 8/16 APC, D. February 28, 2026

The Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India, had recommended that a separate mechanism be set up at the level of the Chief Secretary to address the problems arising out of natural calamities and to establish disaster response mechanisms in the state by predicting and selecting their potential locations, implementing various schemes in line with disaster management, conducting training programmes on disaster management, and responding promptly to disasters. Following this direction of the Central Government, a meeting of the Central Implementation Group under the chairmanship of the Chief Secretary has been held and an Emergency Management Ward has been created under the control of the Revenue and Forest Department. Accordingly, 41 posts have been sanctioned in this ward.

2. Reference No. By the decision of the Government of 1. From 1st September, 2025 to D. These temporary positions were extended through February 28, 2026. Reference Day No. As per the Government Decision No. 2, the Department of Finance has given temporary posts. From March 1, 2026 to d. Administrative divisions have been empowered to extend the deadline until August 31, 2026. Accordingly, the issue of extension of these posts was under consideration of the Government.

The 41 posts indicated in the accompanying prospectus- "A" in the Disaster Management Division will be filled up. From March 1, 2026 to d. The government is approving an extension until August 32, 2026.

Expenditure on salary and allowances of posts in the extended return - "A" Demand No. C-4, Principal Head, 2052-Secretariat General Service (00) (08) Emergency Management Cell (Mandatory) (2052 0606) 01- Salary to be apportioned from the grants to be sanctioned for the respective financial year under this head.
3. Subject to the said Government Decision No. 2.) is being issued in accordance with the authority delegated to the administrative departments as per the decision of the Government here.
The decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
